title: coronopus incisus
intro: Coronopus incisus, also known as land cress or rock cress, is a type of annual or biennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to clear heat and relieve fever, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Coronopus incisus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support immune system function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues. Coronopus incisus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a poultice or compress to relieve pain and reduce swelling.
